_comment: Quality constitution. Floors rise only (meta-review action). Lowering requires a human-ratified ADR. Values below are MEASURED reality at bootstrap 2026-06-09/10, except where marked unmeasured. test_count_floor was corrected from an un-measured 201 to the true full-suite count after B-010/B-001. MILESTONE 2026-06-10 (B-011): the 13 integration tests — which had NEVER run since written (the Flyway V1 collision aborted the schema first) — now EXECUTE and PASS in CI against real Postgres/Kafka/Redis (Testcontainers). Full green CI = 263 tests. Floor raised 234->250 (kept under 263 as a safe margin; integration tests only run where Docker is present). This realizes the context-load guardrail L-011/12/13 called for. 2026-06-10 (B-024/B-002): full green CI = 292 tests after the port-boundary fraud/sanctions gate + RLS migration-set-1 + their T3-review fixes; floor raised 250->285. 2026-06-13 (B-002 C5-C7): full green CI = 296 tests after the RLS runtime machinery (routing tx-manager + 15-job @SystemTransactional routing + repeatable FORCE), all dormant behind rls.enforce=false; proven by RlsDormancyIT + RlsEnforceIT; floor raised 285->289. 2026-06-14 (B-002-activation-tenant): full green CI = 299 tests after the per-tenant binding (TenantWorkRunner helper + 6 consumers + 3 billing-sweep splits) + helper/analytics enforce-ITs, all dormant behind rls.enforce=false; verified via PR #2 build+test; floor raised 289->292. 2026-06-14 (B-015): full green CI = 332 tests after the RFC-4180 settlement-CSV fix (Jackson CsvMapper + per-row ParseFailure → persisted PARSE_ERROR exceptions, ~33 aggressive tests); floor raised 292->325. 2026-06-14 (B-025/B-026): full green CI = 394 tests after server-authoritative sanctions geography + fail-closed OFAC screening (real-feed parser, ~62 tests across parser/geo/health/gate); ultracode workflow + security re-review (READY) + 4 CI iterations catching a Flyway collision, an OptionalAssert misuse, and unit-tests-hitting-the-live-feed; floor raised 325->385. 2026-06-14 (B-029): full green CI = 416 tests after server-authoritative gate mode+tenant (CallContext + payment_screening_origin) + idempotent fraud assess (dedup + unique-index backstop via saveAndFlush); floor raised 385->408. 2026-06-14 (B-014): full green CI = 688 tests after meaningful behavior tests on the thin money/security modules (billing/ledger/gateway-api/common) — aggregate line coverage 16%->35% (5090/14530); 7 CI iterations caught agent-test bugs (List.of varargs spread, OptionalAssert.doesNotContain, Mockito varargs arity, HTTP header casing, live-network-in-test, save-defers-flush) + a REAL ledger NPE-on-null-event-type bug (L-042); test_count_floor 408->680, coverage_floor_pct 16->33.
coverage_status: MEASURED 2026-06-10 via JaCoCo, full suite. CORRECTION: the first reading (24%, floor 23) used an INCOMPLETE denominator — fraud & payment-orchestration had no tests then, so JaCoCo emitted no report and their (large) main code was excluded. With tests added (B-014) the complete aggregate is 17% (2479/13956); covered lines actually ROSE (2411->2479). Floor corrected to 16 (1pt under true measured). This is a measurement correction, not coverage regression — flagged for ratification (Q-006, §18.1). Rises from here as modules gain tests.
high_vulns_status: 2026-06-14 (B-006): semgrep Java SAST wired into CI (perpetua-gates sast-scan job, pinned semgrep/semgrep:1.166.0, REPORT-ONLY first run per §15.3). Pre-triaged via a REAL semgrep 1.166.0 run in WSL2 over 703 git-tracked Java files (~100% parse): 0 Java findings across p/java+owasp-top-ten+secrets AND p/security-audit+sql/cmd-injection+xss. L-007/008/009 re-verified intact. Only 2 out-of-scope TS checkout-sdk wildcard-postMessage WARNINGs (accepted, AUDITS.md). gitleaks + OSV-Scanner already gating. high=0 measured by SAST; FLIP semgrep gate report-only->blocking after the first CI run confirms 0 on the runner (see perpetua-gates PENDING block + L-043). Audit-identified design risks still tracked in security/AUDITS.md + BACKLOG.
benchmarks_status: No benchmarks/ harness yet. Establish after a profile target is chosen (ROADMAP Later).

tooling.build: gradle (wrapper); REQUIRES JDK 21 (JAVA_HOME) and a working temp dir
tooling.test: gradle test (JUnit 5); integration tests need Docker (Testcontainers) and self-skip without it
tooling.coverage: WIRED (B-005): jacoco applied to all subprojects; per-module jacocoTestReport XML+HTML; CI aggregates the XMLs vs coverage_floor_pct
tooling.sast: GATES (B-006 flip DONE, L-043): semgrep (p/java+owasp-top-ten+secrets) in CI as the perpetua-gates sast-scan job, pinned semgrep/semgrep@sha256:c180f0c93a17b420c0af5006214a29d3c747c5459c732b740191adf657dd0068 (1.166.0). NOW BLOCKING at 0 findings: the first CI run confirmed a REAL scan (100 rules / 703 files / 0 findings), so the gate was flipped from report-only -> blocking. The step branches on semgrep's exit code (0=clean / 1=findings / >=2=error) to FAIL on real findings AND on a broken scan, passing only on a genuine clean (NOT a bare `|| echo` swallow). high_vulns_max=0 encodes the numeric gate.
tooling.deps: RECOMMENDED google/osv-scanner + OWASP dependency-check — not yet run (B-006)
